title: Quick Access Buttons Visible on Login Page

actions.instruction: Wait for the page to fully load
actions.description: Wait for a full page navigation to complete

actions.instruction: Verify the quick access login buttons are visible below the login form
actions.description: Verify the Quick Access section is visible below the login form

actions.instruction: Verify the "Admin User" button is visible
actions.description: Verify the 'Admin User' button is visible

actions.instruction: Verify the "John Doe" button is visible

actions.instruction: Verify the "Jane Smith" button is visible
